content.problemStatement:
You are given a tree with NNN vertices, where each edge has an associated weight. A tree is a connected graph with no cycles and exactly N−1N-1N−1 edges.

For any two vertices uuu and vvv, define the function F(u,v)F(u, v)F(u,v) as the Bitwise OR of the weights of all the edges on the simple path between uuu and vvv.

You are given QQQ updates. In each update, you are given two integers XXX and YYY, which indicate that the weight of the XXX-th edge in the tree should be changed to YYY.

You are asked to print the value of   ∑i=1N−1∑j=i+1NF(i,j)\sum_{i=1}^{N-1} \sum_{j=i+1}^N F(i, j)∑i=1N−1​∑j=i+1N​F(i,j), initially and after each update.

This represents the sum of F(u,v)F(u, v)F(u,v) for all pairs of vertices (u,v)(u, v)(u,v) in the tree, where 1≤u<v≤N1 \leq u < v \leq N1≤u<v≤N.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ — denoting number of vertices and queries respectively.
The next N−1N-1N−1 lines describe the edges. The iii-th of these N−1N-1N−1 lines contains three space-separated integers uiu_iui​, viv_ivi​ and wiw_iwi​ denoting an edge between uiu_iui​ and viv_ivi​ of weight wiw_iwi​.
The next QQQ lines describe the queries. The iii-th of these QQQ lines contains two space-separated integers XiX_iXi​ and YiY_iYi​ denoting  index of the edge in the tree whose weight needs to be updated and the new weight assigned to the XiX_iXi​-th edge respectively.




Output Format
For each test case, print Q+1Q+1Q+1 space-separated integers denoting the answer to each query.
constraints: The sum of NNN and QQQ over all test cases won't exceed 10510^5105.
